events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario is about drywall joints not being staggered. GA-216 requires that drywall joints be staggered. Non-staggered joints create continuous weak lines, cracking risk. This is a defect at rough-complete stage. Decision: fail. Risk: medium. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70. Value: 0 (no numeric measurement specifically requested, but the cue is visible enough to estimate). Actually the task says "Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance." The measurable condition is joints not staggered. There's no specific numeric value, but I can set value to 0 or maybe the number of un-staggered joints. I'll set value to 0 since no numeric reading. Confidence high.
